channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: On CCTV, Woman From Gujarat Shot Dead At US Supermarket

media:content.media:description: CCTV footage shows a man shooting at Meghnaben Patel

item.description: The woman, who had been working at that general store in Virginia for the last 10 years, has been identified as Meghnaben Patel. She was 45.
item.content:encoded: The woman, who had been working at that general store in Virginia for the last 10 years, has been identified as Meghnaben Patel. She was 45.

item.title: "Absolute Chaos": Israeli Police Recounts Deadly Iran Missile Strike

media:content.media:description: Israeli authorities said the attack took place during Operation Roaring Lion.

item.description: Standing amid collapsed walls, broken prayer halls and damaged homes, Israel International Police Spokesperson Dean Elsdunne, in an exclusive interview with NDTV's Aishvarya Jain, accused Iran of deliberately targeting civilians.
item.content:encoded: Standing amid collapsed walls, broken prayer halls and damaged homes, Israel International Police Spokesperson Dean Elsdunne, in an exclusive interview with NDTV's Aishvarya Jain, accused Iran of deliberately targeting civilians.

item.title: 'US Needs Smart People': LinkedIn, Coursera Founders Slam New Green Card Rule

media:content.media:description: USCIS would grant green cards to people inside US only in extraordinary circumstances

item.description: Reid Hoffman, the co-founder of LinkedIn, questioned the move, saying, "Does this mean AI Researchers, employees, and students will now have to leave the country and wait through a backlog process to continue their work?"
item.content:encoded: Reid Hoffman, the co-founder of LinkedIn, questioned the move, saying, "Does this mean AI Researchers, employees, and students will now have to leave the country and wait through a backlog process to continue their work?"

item.title: Raped, Screamed At, Denied Food: 'Massive' School Abuse Scandal In France

media:content.media:description: School monitors are adults responsible for overseeing children. (AI-generated image)

item.description: Paris prosecutors are now investigating more than 100 cases of alleged abuse, including rape, carried out by school supervisors on children as young as three.
item.content:encoded: Paris prosecutors are now investigating more than 100 cases of alleged abuse, including rape, carried out by school supervisors on children as young as three.

item.title: "Felt Like I Was Dying": French Woman Says Ex Sold Her To Over 487 Men

media:content.media:description: Laetitia R said that the actions were "pure and simple violence" and she was in "constant fear"

item.description: Guillaume Bucci has admitted to acts like strangulation, burning and acts of bestiality but said that these were "consensual sexual games in the context of their intimate relationship". He said that he did not think he was "hurting" her.
item.content:encoded: Guillaume Bucci has admitted to acts like strangulation, burning and acts of bestiality but said that these were "consensual sexual games in the context of their intimate relationship". He said that he did not think he was "hurting" her.

item.title: Iran Negotiators Seek $24 Billion Frozen Assets Release In US Deal: Report

media:content.media:description: There is no official figure for the amount of frozen Iranian assets abroad.

item.description: A top Iranian delegation was in Qatar after Tehran said it was finalising a 14-point framework for a deal on ending the war, which began with US-Israeli airstrikes against Iran on February 28.
item.content:encoded: A top Iranian delegation was in Qatar after Tehran said it was finalising a 14-point framework for a deal on ending the war, which began with US-Israeli airstrikes against Iran on February 28.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Great Chinese 'Miracle' Is Quickly Turning Into A Debt Nightmare
item.description: According to some reports, China's total debt-to-GDP ratio has topped a whopping 300%
item.content:encoded: According to some reports, China's total debt-to-GDP ratio has topped a whopping 300%

item.title: 2 Children Among 4 Killed After Train Hits School Bus In Belgium

media:content.media:description: Seven children, a supervisor and a driver were aboard the minibus.

item.description: Belgium Train Hits School Bus: Several Dead After Train Hits School Bus In Belgium
item.content:encoded: Belgium Train Hits School Bus: Several Dead After Train Hits School Bus In Belgium

item.title: Quad To Launch Fuel Security Forum To Protect Energy Flow In Indo-Pacific

media:content.media:description: New Delhi has stepped forward as a key pillar of the Quad's response architecture

item.description: The four nations announced the creation of a Quad Fuel Security Forum - a high-level coordination body designed to facilitate crisis response, policy alignment, and market analysis during periods of acute energy stress.
item.content:encoded: The four nations announced the creation of a Quad Fuel Security Forum - a high-level coordination body designed to facilitate crisis response, policy alignment, and market analysis during periods of acute energy stress.

item.title: US-Iran War LIVE: US Says Iran War Disagreements Down To "A Word, A Sentence"

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: The US Central Command said the strikes were conducted in "self-defence."

item.description: Iran War: The US military on Monday carried out strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats laying mines.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The US military on Monday carried out strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats laying mines.

item.title: Trump Pushes Middle East Reset, Pak Faces Saudi, Abraham Accords Dilemma
item.description: Pakistan faces a dilemma over the Abraham Accords, needing to recognise Israel for economic gains but opposing it without Palestinian statehood.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan faces a dilemma over the Abraham Accords, needing to recognise Israel for economic gains but opposing it without Palestinian statehood.

item.title: 'Hezbollah Planned Hamas-Like Attacks On Israel': Israeli Commander To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Israel has repeatedly accused Hezbollah of embedding military infrastructure inside civilian areas

item.description: Referring to Israeli operations in southern Lebanon, the official said his brigade first entered the area in October 2024 and claimed troops found weapons, underground tunnels and fortified positions close to the Israeli border.
item.content:encoded: Referring to Israeli operations in southern Lebanon, the official said his brigade first entered the area in October 2024 and claimed troops found weapons, underground tunnels and fortified positions close to the Israeli border.

item.title: Israel Bets On Big Tech Over Warfronts, Has An Iran Request For India

media:content.media:description: Israeli officials expect India to officially classify the IRGC as a terrorist outfit.

item.description: Israel urges India to classify IRGC as terrorist and highlights tech in Middle East strategy
item.content:encoded: Israel urges India to classify IRGC as terrorist and highlights tech in Middle East strategy

item.title: At Quad Meet, A $20 Billion Deal To Break China's Grip on Critical Minerals

media:content.media:description: The framework specifically targets initiatives with a "Quad nexus".

item.description: The Quad Critical Minerals Initiative, announced at the conclusion of a Foreign Ministers' meeting in New Delhi, establishes a structured cooperation framework.
item.content:encoded: The Quad Critical Minerals Initiative, announced at the conclusion of a Foreign Ministers' meeting in New Delhi, establishes a structured cooperation framework.

item.title: 'Next Time I'll Stab You': Russia Sees Spate Of Wartime School Attacks

media:content.media:description: Sometimes a teacher plays the role of an attacker.

item.description: There have been at least 14 reported attacks in schools and other educational institutions so far this year -- compared with 15 in the whole of 2025.
item.content:encoded: There have been at least 14 reported attacks in schools and other educational institutions so far this year -- compared with 15 in the whole of 2025.

item.title: Iran Takes Dig At Marco Rubio For Taj Mahal Visit. It Has A Persian Connect

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio visited the Taj Mahal with his Jeanette Rubio

item.description: Consulate General of Iran in Hyderabad stated that if Marco Rubio "knew the history or architecture, he wouldn't have posed for a picture here"
item.content:encoded: Consulate General of Iran in Hyderabad stated that if Marco Rubio "knew the history or architecture, he wouldn't have posed for a picture here"

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | A New Sunni Bloc Is Taking Shape, And Pak May Be Its Biggest Winner
item.description: If the idea does come to fruition, then such a bloc would have been a long time in making. And it would have a formidable spread, going all the way from the Arabian Sea to the Mediterranean, controlling strategic ports, shipping and maritime routes.
item.content:encoded: If the idea does come to fruition, then such a bloc would have been a long time in making. And it would have a formidable spread, going all the way from the Arabian Sea to the Mediterranean, controlling strategic ports, shipping and maritime routes.

item.title: India, US Sign Critical Minerals Pact As Marco Rubio Wraps Up Delhi Visit

media:content.media:description: India holds significant deposits of minerals, including lithium, cobalt, and titanium

item.description: The landmark framework on rare earth supply chains caps a four-day trip by Secretary of State Marco Rubio that significantly deepened strategic ties between Washington and New Delhi.
item.content:encoded: The landmark framework on rare earth supply chains caps a four-day trip by Secretary of State Marco Rubio that significantly deepened strategic ties between Washington and New Delhi.

item.title: Iran Claims It Shot Down US' MQ-9 Drone Amid Peace Talks

media:content.media:description: The incident comes after the United States carried out so-called "self-defence" strikes o Iran

item.description: The Guard's forces also claimed they "fired upon an RQ-4 drone and an intruding F-35 fighter jet", without specifying when the incidents took place.
item.content:encoded: The Guard's forces also claimed they "fired upon an RQ-4 drone and an intruding F-35 fighter jet", without specifying when the incidents took place.

item.title: Quad Powers Draw Hard Lines On China, Terror, Critical Materials In Delhi

media:content.media:description: The statement reflected growing Quad concerns.

item.description: In their most comprehensive joint statement yet, the foreign ministers of India, Australia, Japan, and the United States deliver pointed warnings.
item.content:encoded: In their most comprehensive joint statement yet, the foreign ministers of India, Australia, Japan, and the United States deliver pointed warnings.
